name: Al Quran Cloud
usage: Quran Arabic text, translations, transliteration, audio, surah and juz navigation.

name: AlAdhan
usage: Prayer times, calculation methods, madhab school parameter, Hijri calendar data, qibla direction.

name: Quran Foundation APIs
usage: Production upgrade path for typed SDKs, content APIs, search, OAuth, bookmarks, notes, and reading progress.

name: Hadith API
usage: Optional server-side hadith search if a private API key is configured.

name: OpenAI Responses API
usage: Optional AI companion for personalized study guidance and source-aware web browsing when OPENAI_API_KEY is configured.

name: OpenStreetMap, Nominatim, and Overpass
usage: Masjid and halal restaurant finder using open map data with attribution.
